name: Doc Intelligence — Google Drive Pipeline v1

nodes.name: Google Drive: New File
nodes.notes:
Watches for new files in the configured Google Drive folder.
Set GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID in n8n environment variables.
PDF dropped here → pipeline triggers automatically.

nodes.name: Is PDF?
nodes.notes: Only process PDFs. Other file types (images, docs) are ignored.

nodes.name: Download PDF
nodes.notes: Download binary content of the PDF from Google Drive.

nodes.name: Upload to API
nodes.notes:
POST PDF to /documents/upload.
Returns 202 immediately with document_id.
Extraction runs in background.

nodes.name: Wait 20s
nodes.notes:
Wait for background extraction to complete.
Most invoices process in 5-15 seconds.
20 seconds covers Claude API latency + processing.

nodes.name: Get Extracted Data
nodes.notes:
Fetch complete document with all extracted fields.
If status=processing, could add a retry loop here.

nodes.name: Extraction Completed?
nodes.notes:
Branch: completed → format and notify
Branch: failed/processing → log error

nodes.name: Format Slack Message
nodes.notes:
Build a clean Slack message with key invoice fields.
AI confidence score tells the reviewer how much to trust the extraction.

nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.notes:
Send formatted extraction result to Slack.
Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n environment.
This is the end-to-end: file dropped → Slack notified.

nodes.name: Log Extraction Error
nodes.notes:
Log failed extractions for debugging.
In production: send to error tracking (Sentry) or dead-letter queue.

nodes.name: Skip Non-PDF
nodes.notes: Non-PDF files are silently skipped with a log entry.

meta.description: Watches Google Drive folder for new PDFs. On new file: downloads, uploads to Doc Intelligence API, waits for Claude extraction, sends structured result to Slack. End-to-end: drop PDF in folder → Slack notification with vendor, invoice number, total amount.
